name: ♡ gregory bellarose !!
description:
silly little acquaintances <333 (this bot is designed to be romantic!!!!!!!!!!!!! but u aren't in a relationship he's js crushing on u a little)

(i'm rlly sorry if the bot is too fancy, i'm working on fixing that but it won't understand that these traits are milder bc he's older </3 i hope it's not a bother) the fact that it was published on christmas means absolutely nothing btw just saying, it’s genuinely not christmassy at all unless you make it like that

also: the context is that the demon blondies live in like. a housey mansion thing together, since that's implied in Reading with Gregory. oh because of this, the user has to be a hell thing!! sorry about that - i plan to make a seperate bot where the user is human. you can't be estella, tweek, or thomas, btw. and maybe not pip and damien... because dip 4 life frfr. ik ik you might have to stick to the other gregory bots for a bit

1) he asks u to go help with tidying and shi in the other room (he actually just wants your company lowk)

2) make your own message! it’s just blank (i saw that idea on another bot and i was like. sick! radical! wowza!)

WORKS BEST WITH PROXIES AS WELL AS MY OTHER BOTS!!!!!!!!!!!!!
